description_long: This is a large, rectangular metal dumpster with a weathered green body and a hinged, split lid made of orange-painted metal. The lid is partially open, revealing a spacious, empty interior suitable for holding large volumes of waste. The exterior shows signs of rust, dirt, and wear, indicating prolonged outdoor use. The dumpster is mounted on four small wheels, allowing for mobility, and features a reinforced rim for structural stability. No visible handles or warning labels are present on the exterior. The utilitarian design suggests it is intended for heavy-duty waste collection in urban environments.
description: A large, green metal dumpster with a split orange lid, mounted on wheels and showing signs of outdoor wear.
description_view_0: Side view showing the partially open orange lid and the green, weathered body with visible wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the split lid, with one half open and the spacious interior exposed.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with the open lid section more prominent and the interior visible.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the full width of the split orange lid and the green back panel.
attribute_lid_type: split, hinged, flat metal lid with two sections; no visible locking mechanism
